I build clean, mobile-first websites for salons, gyms, cafes, clinics, coaching centers, and local businesses that want more WhatsApp enquiries, bookings, calls, and trust.

Built by Nikhil Ogia — for local businesses that want to look premium online without wasting money on bloated agency websites.

Your Business May Be Good.
But Does It Look Good Online?

Most small businesses lose trust because their online presence looks outdated, incomplete, or only depends on Instagram. A proper website helps customers quickly see services, prices, location, reviews, and contact options.

Customers cannot quickly see services and prices

Potential customers visit your profile but leave because they cannot find clear information about what you offer and how much it costs.

Instagram alone does not build enough trust

Social media is great for discovery, but serious customers expect a professional website that shows you are a legitimate business.

No clear WhatsApp/call flow means lost enquiries

Without a clear way to contact you, interested customers get frustrated and move on to competitors who make it easier.

The Solution

A clean website makes your business look trustworthy and makes it easier for customers to contact you.

No complicated features. No bloated pages. Just a professional website that turns visitors into leads.

What We Build

Purpose-built websites designed to convert visitors into leads for your specific type of business.

Salon & Spa Websites

Elegant websites with services, packages, gallery, reviews, and WhatsApp booking.

More booking enquiries through WhatsApp

Gym & Fitness Websites

Bold websites with programs, membership plans, transformation sections, and trial booking.

More membership enquiries and trial signups

Cafe & Restaurant Websites

Warm websites with menu, gallery, table reservation, opening hours, and location.

More table reservations and takeaway orders

Coaching & Clinic Websites

Clear websites with services, appointments, credibility sections, and enquiry forms.

More appointment bookings and enquiries

Portfolio Websites

Premium personal or professional websites for creators, photographers, consultants, and experts.

Stronger professional presence and client enquiries

Local Service Business Websites

Lead-focused websites for interior designers, electricians, repair services, and consultants.

More local leads and service enquiries

Demo Portfolio

See how your business could look online. These are real examples of websites built for local businesses.

Premium Salon Website

Aura Luxe Salon & Spa

Elegant beauty website with services, packages, gallery, WhatsApp booking, and local SEO.

  • Service menu with pricing
  • Package highlights
  • Before/after gallery
  • WhatsApp booking integration
  • Customer testimonials
  • Local SEO optimization
Premium Gym Website

IronForge Fitness

Bold fitness website with programs, transformation plans, membership pricing, and trial booking.

  • Training programs showcase
  • Membership plans & pricing
  • Transformation gallery
  • Free trial booking
  • Trainer profiles
  • Class schedule
Modern Cafe Website

Bloom & Brew Cafe

Warm cafe website with menu, signature items, gallery, reservation CTA, and contact form.

  • Digital menu with photos
  • Signature items highlight
  • Ambiance gallery
  • Table reservation
  • Opening hours & location
  • Online ordering link

Built for Business Results,
Not Just Looks.

Every element is designed with one goal: turning visitors into leads for your business.

Built for WhatsApp leads

Every website is designed to drive enquiries directly to your WhatsApp, making it easy for customers to reach you.

Mobile-first design

Your customers are on mobile. Your website is built for them first, with responsive design that works on all devices.

Clean premium visuals

No cluttered templates. Every design is custom-crafted to look professional and build trust with your visitors.

Fast loading

Speed matters. Your website loads quickly to keep visitors engaged and improve search rankings.

Local SEO basics

Built-in SEO structure helps your business show up when local customers search for your services.

Easy to update

Simple content management means you can make small changes yourself without technical knowledge.

Business-focused copywriting

Clear, conversion-focused content that speaks to your customers and drives them to take action.

Free homepage preview option

See exactly how your business will look online before committing to the full project.

Trusted by local businesses
Fast turnaround times
Dedicated support
Results-focused approach

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the package that fits your business needs. No hidden fees, no surprises.

Starter Website

Simple one-page websites

₹4,999 – ₹7,999
  • 1-page website
  • Mobile responsive design
  • WhatsApp button
  • Call button
  • Google Maps section
  • Basic SEO
  • Delivery in 3–5 days
Most Popular

Business Website

Serious local businesses

₹9,999 – ₹14,999
  • 4–5 pages
  • Home, About, Services, Gallery, Contact
  • WhatsApp lead flow
  • Contact form
  • Google Maps
  • Basic local SEO
  • Premium design
  • Delivery in 5–7 days

Premium Website

Stronger brand presence

₹19,999 – ₹29,999
  • 5–7 pages
  • Premium custom design
  • Advanced sections
  • Better visuals
  • Conversion-focused layout
  • Local SEO structure
  • Analytics setup
  • Delivery in 7–14 days

Monthly Maintenance

₹999 – ₹2,999/month

Small content updates
Image changes
Offer/banner updates
Basic support
Performance checks
Minor edits

How It Works

A simple, streamlined process to get your business online and generating leads.

01

Business Audit

I check your current online presence, competitors, and what your customers need to see.

02

Free Homepage Preview

I create a homepage preview so you can see how your business could look online.

03

Content Collection

You share logo, photos, services, prices, location, and contact details.

04

Website Build

I build the full mobile-first website with WhatsApp, call, Google Maps, and lead-focused sections.

05

Launch and Support

The website goes live, and I help with updates or maintenance if needed.

Try Before You Commit

Want to See How Your Business Could Look Online?

I'll create a free homepage preview for your business. If you like it, we can discuss the full website. No pressure, no payment for the preview.

No payment required for preview
Quick turnaround on preview
See exactly what you get

No pressure. No payment for the preview. You only move forward if you like the direction.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about working with Nikhil Web Studio.

No. The homepage preview is completely free. You only pay if you like the direction and decide to build the full website. This is my way of showing you exactly what you can expect before any commitment.

A simple one-page website usually takes 3–5 days. A business website with multiple pages typically takes 5–7 days. Premium websites with custom features can take 7–14 days depending on the complexity and how quickly you provide the content.

Yes, real photos make the website much stronger and more trustworthy. If you don't have professional photos, even good quality phone photos work well. If you don't have any photos yet, I can create a clean demo layout first and we can replace the visuals later when you have them.

Yes, absolutely. I specialize in building websites for local businesses where trust, services, location, and WhatsApp enquiries matter. Whether you're a salon owner, gym trainer, cafe manager, clinic owner, coach, or run a PG/hostel, I can create a website that brings you more leads.

Yes, every website is designed mobile-first because most customers visit from phones. Your website will look great and work perfectly on mobile phones, tablets, and desktop computers. I test on multiple devices to ensure a smooth experience everywhere.

Yes, I can guide you through the entire process. I'll help you choose and purchase a domain name, set up hosting, and deploy your website. If you're not tech-savvy, I can handle the technical setup for you so you don't have to worry about it.

Once your website is live, you own it completely. You can manage small updates yourself if you're comfortable, or you can choose a monthly maintenance plan where I handle updates, changes, and support for you. Many clients prefer the maintenance plan so they can focus on their business while I keep their website running smoothly.

Still have questions?
